summary: Tested territory pricing with 804 rows (67 counties × 4 categories × 3 types). All backend API tests passed (18/18). Frontend industry dropdown shows all 7 hardcoded options correctly. Tier selection works and updates invoice. Map county selection has CORS issue with third-party geocoding service (nominatim.openstreetmap.org).

integration_issues.issue: CORS error when calling nominatim.openstreetmap.org for city geocoding - prevents automatic state detection from city input
integration_issues.note: Third-party service issue, not core functionality. Users can still manually click on states to drill down to counties.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (tier selection, industry dropdown working; map geocoding has CORS issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase data with 804 rows in territory_pricings
context_for_next_testing_agent: territory_pricings table has 804 rows (67 counties × 4 categories × 3 types). Pricing lookup uses (county, category, category_type) as key. Prices: Plumber(s=200,m=450,l=900), Pest Control Service(s=180,m=400,l=850), Well & Septic Co.(s=250,m=500,l=1000), Electricians(s=220,m=480,l=950). Frontend tier mapping: small-standard→small, small-premium→medium, large-full→large. Industry dropdown uses hardcoded slugs mapped to DB category names via industryLabels.
verified_features: POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing with category_type=small for Electricians returns $220 for all counties
POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing with category_type=medium for Electricians returns $480
POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing with category_type=large for Plumber returns $900
POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing with category_type=small for Pest Control Service returns $180
POST /api/contracts/territory-pricing with category_type=small for Well & Septic Co. returns $250
GET /api/contracts/categories returns 4 categories with pricing by type
Frontend industry dropdown shows original hardcoded options (well-septic, plumbers, electricians, air-heating, pest-control, real-estate, roofing)
Tier selection updates invoice correctly (Standard=$100/mo, Premium=$200/mo, Full Suite=$400/mo)
Category normalization handles plural/singular forms (Plumbers→Plumber, Electrician→Electricians)
